EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not remove a load balancer on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not create a load balancer on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created load balancer "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} removed a load balancer on host {event_src.host}
